headline: How Investors May Respond To Dollar General (DG) Elevating AI Spending And Raising Its 2026 Outlook
summary: Earlier in June 2026, Dollar General announced a major leadership realignment across artificial intelligence, technology, store operations and real estate, while reaffirming plans for US$1.40–US$1.50 billion in fiscal 2026 capital spending on remodels, new stores and technology upgrades. The combination of a dedicated chief data and AI officer and continued investment in projects like DG Market-format remodels highlights how Dollar General is trying to use data and fresh food offerings to...

headline: Dollar General (DG) Stock After Recent Discount Retail Headwinds Is There An Opportunity Now
summary: If you are wondering whether Dollar General stock looks cheap or fairly priced today, it helps to start with a clear picture of how the market has treated it recently and what that might say about expectations. The stock last closed at US$114.58, with returns of 0.7% over the past week and 8.5% over the past month. The return so far this year is down 16.3% and the 1 year return is 3.2% against deeper declines over 3 and 5 years. Recent headlines around Dollar General have focused on the...
